data.body: Done. Corrected gate-level 'three-pass' -> 'four-pass (find → verify → decide → coach)' in: passes.py:1, mcp_server.py:657, _cli/_llm_commands.py:215/225, schemas/plan_review_verdict.schema.json:5, llm/plan_review/__init__.py:10/48, attest.py:13, docs/plan-review-gate.md (header + lines 33/50/73/236). Disambiguated docs/reuse-surface.md:181 to 'three model-driven passes (find/verify/coach)'. Preserved intentionally: the 'shared three-pass framework (epic 9da1)' lineage (registry.py:53, plan-review-gate.md:73) and the reviewer prompt .md files (decision-core role; avoids the prompt-index drift gate). Verified: 382 plan_review/schema/prompt tests pass, ruff clean, schema JSON valid.
